strategicSuggestions: Google Business Profile Emergency: Zero engagement (0 interactions, 75 views -8% YoY) is a critical red flag for local visibility. Immediately audit GBP listing, ensure all information is complete and verified, add high-quality photos/videos, and post weekly updates. This directly impacts inbound lead quality.

Pipeline Engagement Crisis: With only 4 warm leads and declining reply rates, consider a structured outreach sequence (email-LinkedIn-phone) for cold-warming. Nancy (6+ weeks silent) and Angela (bounced email) are immediate revenue at risk.

Q2 Content Strategy: Zero blog posts published this week despite 3 scheduled and 7 Squarespace service pages pending. Dedicate recurring time block (Tuesdays 10-11 AM post-Rooks?) to content publishing to fuel organic traffic and authority growth.
Mailchimp Decision: If keeping email newsletter, migrate to affordable tier (Brevo/ConvertKit) to reduce monthly costs. If pausing, document subscriber list for future use.

Sitemap Technical Debt: Only 70 of 1,280 pages crawled on constantcreates.com is a major SEO issue. Fix sitemap.xml, remove non-indexable pages, and prioritize crawlable content. This blocks organic discovery.

Revenue Target at Risk: April pace ($1,200 in 7 days = ~$5,140/month projected) is on track for $5K goal, but only with retained clients. Focus energy on closing Angela ($1K), reactivating Nancy ($250), and Peleta upsell ($300) to build safety margin.

Wendy Ellis (VMC) - $2K/month Client: Meeting notes from yesterday likely contain critical action items for website redesign (photo updates, metadata SEO, page revisions). Prioritize review to keep momentum and avoid delays.

Domain Transfer Blocker: Colby Animal Foundation nonprofit site ($1,200) is stalled waiting for Wendy's IT department. One phone call to Robert Seal could unblock $1,200 in immediate revenue. This is overdue 12+ days.

Limited CC Time Constraint: Tuesday is a Rooks full day with only ~1 hour CC window (5:30-6:30 PM). Be ruthless about prioritization. Today: verification, follow-ups, and testing only. Complex strategy work moves to lower-Rooks days.

Q2 Authority Push: Reactivate LinkedIn + blog content engine to establish thought leadership and warm up cold pipeline. Consider 1-2 LinkedIn posts/week + 2 blog posts/month minimum to drive inbound and SEO growth.
